description_long: This is a compact, sporty coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a distinctive green and black paint scheme. The exterior features custom graphics, including a stylized skull and text, as well as racing decals and sponsor logos on the hood, doors, and rear. The car has two doors, a sloping fastback roofline, and tinted windows, giving it a sleek, aggressive appearance. The wheels are large with low-profile tires and black multi-spoke rims, suggesting a performance-oriented design. The front end is characterized by pop-up style headlights, a subtle front bumper, and a hood with visible graphics. The rear includes a modest integrated spoiler, dual exhausts, and detailed taillights, emphasizing its sporty nature.
description: A green and black two-door coupe car with custom graphics, racing decals, and a fastback roofline. It features large black wheels, tinted windows, and a sporty, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pop-up headlights, custom hood graphics, and a wide, low bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the racing decals, sponsor logos, and the car's fastback silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the integrated spoiler, dual exhausts, and detailed taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible custom graphics, large wheels, and the coupe's sloping roofline.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
